evidence: The gecko repeatedly holds a vertical/edge posture with the tail and hindquarters positioned over the container edge.
A small dark object/mark near the lower vent/tail area becomes visible in the event frames.
The posture persists across multiple sampled timestamps, which is less consistent with ordinary travel.
why_segmentvlm_helped: Splitting the clip exposes the posture sequence rather than treating the whole 38s clip as general movement.
